title: UK REACH authorisation for C&E Plating Limited, 29 July 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name Chromium trioxide.  Authorised use Industrial use of chromium trioxide for functional chrome-plating with decorative character on metallic objects.  Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number C&E Plating Limited (UKREACH/25/16/00).  Date of decision 29 July 2025  "
